title: calophyllum cucullatum
intro: Calophyllum cucullatum, also known as the Cupped Calophyllum or Cupped Tree, is a species of tree in the family Calophyllaceae. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its seed oil, which has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Calophyllum cucullatum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and protect against infections. The seed oil is often used in herbal preparations, such as topical creams and ointments, as well as in aromatherapy and massage oils.
